Package io.graphite.api

package io.graphite.api
Public service APIs for graph algorithms.

Rather than exposing algorithm implementations directly, Graphite groups related algorithms into specialized service APIs.

Typical usage: 

graph.traversal().bfs(0);
graph.shortestPath().dijkstra(0);
graph.mst().prim();
graph.connectivity().bridges();

This approach keeps the public API compact, organized, and easy to discover.

Since:
2.0
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    io.graphite
    Graphite is a modern graph library for Java that provides graph data structures, graph algorithms, graph generation utilities, formatting, benchmarking, and graph input/output facilities.
    io.graphite.api.analysis
     
    io.graphite.api.internal
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    Bipartite
    Provides bipartite graph algorithms.
    Connectivity
    Provides graph connectivity algorithms.
    Cycle
    Provides graph cycle detection algorithms.
    Euler
    Provides Euler path and circuit algorithms.
    MST
    Provides Minimum Spanning Tree (MST) algorithms.
    ShortestPath
    Provides shortest path algorithms.
    Topology
    Provides topological ordering algorithms.
    Traversal
    Provides graph traversal algorithms.
